title: orchis sthenanthera
intro: Orchis sthenanthera, also known as the man orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Orchis sthenanthera include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture, decoction, or powder for use in herbal remedies, often in combination with other medicinal plants.
